error_count.description: The number of errors that were encountered when invalidating the API keys.

error_details.description:
Details about the errors.
This field is not present in the response when `error_count` is `0`.

invalidated_api_keys.description: The IDs of the API keys that were invalidated as part of this request.

previously_invalidated_api_keys.description: The IDs of the API keys that were already invalidated.
